title: Our new workflow builder is coming and we are looking for 'Alpha' users!
excerpt:
Attention Community Members: Our new workflow builder is coming and we are looking for early adopters users for our ‘Alpha’ version.
The workflow builder is the new generation of how users will build automations in monda…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Attention Community Members: Our new workflow builder is coming and we are looking for early adopters users for our ‘Alpha’ version.

The workflow builder is the new generation of how users will build automations in monday.com in a more flexible, robust, and visual way.
Want to become Alpha users before it is released to everyone?!

**Watch the video below and fill out this form.

posts.author: APICaptain (Calum Klesel)
posts.cookedHtml: This looks awesome!!

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: Signed up! Looking forward to condition paths.

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml: Signed up and eager to try out!

posts.author: nataliasmith (Natalia Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: @briannastoryfile potentially something we want to test?

posts.author: JIvan (Jennifer Ivan)
posts.cookedHtml: This looks amazing! Hoping to be one of the first to try it out.

posts.author: DafneLaunchPoint (Dafne)
posts.cookedHtml: Ooooh yes please!!!

posts.author: eanderson (EthanLaunchPoint)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like Alpha access as well!

posts.author: ElliotL (Elliot lamerton)
posts.cookedHtml: Filled out form and would love to test this

posts.author: mamta (Mamta Madhusudan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Juliette :

sed to everyone?!

This is awesome. Looking forward to this.

posts.author: jshubert (Jeremy Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: Excited! I think this resolves two of my open feature requests…OR’s in Automations and a better way to visualize automations, I had suggested folders to categorize them but I think this Workflow Builder is even better than my asks.

posts.author: AlexTechnical (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: Is the signup for individual users, or would it put our whole company in Alpha tester status?

posts.author: dbt (Doron)
posts.cookedHtml:
This all looks great, but first need a lighter faster app and full offline and background upload.
Let’s make it work better, then add the cherry on top, not the other way around.

posts.author: CreativeDirector (John Murdock)
posts.cookedHtml: cannot wait for this

posts.author: amandaswys (Amanda Swystun)
posts.cookedHtml: Signed up! As a monday.com guru in my previous role, I am super excited to be back to using monday.com and trying out all of it’s features.

posts.author: ollatpe (Ole Bo Larsen)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please to being a tester. We are not yet using this feature but it’s something on our optimisation list.

posts.author: kaseybistro (Kaseyb)
posts.cookedHtml: Looks amazing. Looking forward to alpha testing

posts.author: CreativeDirector (John Murdock)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes Please would love to join

posts.author: jshubert (Jeremy Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: Any ideas when ‘Alpha’ release is happening? Did I not make the cut?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jeremy!

The alpha list was closed, but the workflow builder is coming soon and you will be able to give it a try.

There will be more changes for our community to Alpha test some of our upcoming features so stay tuned

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Julietteb, any news on the development on the workflows?

posts.author: jshubert (Jeremy Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: I see on an other forum question that the Beta is supposed to be released this month. Will this expand the feature to more users?

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: When is it being released? I really want to begin using it already?

posts.author: jshubert (Jeremy Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: There’s a nice work instruction for this now, I checked in Monday Labs but the Beta wasn’t available. https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/11065311570066-Get-started-monday-workflows When could we start using this?

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: Any idea when I’ll have it on my account?

posts.author: Patrmg (Patrmg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Do you have new informations about the workflow builder?
Thank you.

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way this feature can be installed on my account?

posts.author: Robgulac (Rob)
posts.cookedHtml: @Julietteb Any updates on implementation of the Workflow Builder? I’ve been dragging my heels because of how time consuming it is to rewrite automations in order to re-sequence them or insert a step, but really can’t wait much longer!

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
It still isn’t as far as normal automations are unfortunately.

For example it cannot get dropdown or location column values and populate them in other board as in workflow Builder all resurfaced information is turned into a text column unfortunately.
